dialogos.texto_en: I didn't expect everyone\nto gather here again tonight...
But we can't just leave Miku\nand Fu-kun like that, can we?
Even when we watched the sunset on the beach,\nand during dinner, they were trying to act normal,\nbut it was awkward...
So, where are Miku and Futaro-kun?
Miku is in her room.\nShe's lying on her bed, hugging her pillow.
And Raiha-chan is watching over Uesugi-san.
Okay, let's confirm first.\nHave they reconciled in the first place%p-2;――
Well, they didn't really fight,\nso it's strange to say they reconciled, but umm...
Anyway, they seemed\nto have reconciled at least once, right?
Yeah.\nI heard from Uesugi-san that he carried out\na plan to reconcile, and it went well.
I see...
Fu-kun said he didn't know the reason\nbehind Miku's attitude,\nso how did they resolve it?
I'm not sure about that.\nBut I thought they talked it out\nand came to an understanding.
...It seems that Miku has some reasons\nfor not being able to be with Uesugi-kun,\neven though she wants to be with him deep down.
Yes, she said that.
In the end, that issue hasn't been resolved,\nis that right?
Well...\nin any case, this can't continue as so.
If those two can't reconcile here and now,\nI think it will continue to be like this even after the trip.
Uesugi-kun will soon leave for Tokyo.\nIf they're separated in that situation...
I know how strong Miku's feelings are for Uesugi-kun, but even so,\nI don't think it will end well.
Yeah...
I'm the same as Itsuki-chan.\nSo%p-2;――
Even though it might be nosy of us,\nwhat do you think about us helping them?
Let's do it!\nI think Miku and Uesugi-san\nare just a bit out of sync.
Yes, that's right.\nOut of sync.
In my opinion,\nmaybe they're both misunderstanding each other,\nand getting tangled up in a strange way.
So, even though Futaro-kun tried to intervene,\nit didn't come across well to Miku,\nand may have even made the misunderstanding worse.
That's possible...\nUesugi-kun does sometimes struggle\nwith expressing himself.
But on the other hand,\nhe can also demonstrate things through his actions.
...Yes, that's true.\nBut there are times when even that doesn't work out.
This might be one of those times.
Also, Miku is stubborn.\nFu-kun is quite hard-headed as well.
In that case, isn't this where we need to help them out?
Sounds like a good idea. Let's do it.
Huh?
What's with that face?
Oh, no, it's just that yesterday\nyou said you weren't really rooting for them,\nso I was surprised.
That's true, yeah?
...It's not like I want Miku to be unhappy.\nAnd I don't want to see Fu-kun sad either.
But just remember, this is a one time thing.\nIf I help and it's still not working out for you guys,\nI will go ahead and steal Miku away from you.
Ehehe...\nNino, you sure are kind.
Huh?
Let's do our best for Miku and Uesugi-san!
I said, it's not exactly for them...
Then, who is it for?
It doesn't matter, does it?\nGimme a break!
Ultimately, Miku and Uesugi-kun\nshould be the ones to resolve this,\nbut we still need to help them.
That being said, what should we do?
I think we should try to figure out why things've\ngotten like this. Let's talk to Miku and Uesugi-san\nand see what they have to say.
